data.title: 国际服开服200天礼物
data.summary: [Global Launch 200-Days Celebration Gift] Congratulations for 200 days since coming to Kivotos! Plea
data.body:
[Global Launch 200-Days Celebration Gift]

Congratulations for 200 days since coming to Kivotos!
Please check your in-game mailbox for a gift from Schale, Pyroxene x1,200!
(Available until 06/03/2022 14:59 PM.(UTC))

https://nexon.link/9mM
